# Autogenerated Documentation

The automatic register extraction and documentation has about 98% coverage of the chip functions. You may refer to these as your first stop for information. Each section contains an approximate link back to the source RTL. Developers with some familiarity with Verilog can use this to help understand function, and/or the target RTL can be fed into an LLM for explanation.

- [Peripherals](https://ci.betrusted.io/bao1x/)
- [CPU complex](https://ci.betrusted.io/bao1x-cpu/)
